sigWerErrors.reason: 'Thẻ' (card) and 'thể' (form/body) are different words; this changes the meaning of the object being requested, which could confuse the listener.
'Hiện tại' means 'present (time)', while 'điện thoại' means 'telephone'; this substitution changes the meaning of the time reference to a device, making the sentence incoherent.
